---
title: "Registration to the datathon"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
---

## Instructions

Teams or individuals willing to register to the datathon should fill the registration form. The form will be open until May 31th 2026. 
In case of teams, each individual team member has to register separately, but they should all use the same team name. 

## Registration form

To register, please fill this [form](https://forms.cloud.microsoft/e/mysxaJNq6m). The form will be open until May 31th 2026.
